name: French Onion Soup#1
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large Dutch oven over medium heat, melt butter.
2. Add onions and sugar. Cover and cook, stirring occasionally, for 30 minutes or until onions are tender but not colored.
3. Uncover the pan, increase the heat slightly, and continue to cook, stirring regularly until onions reach a rich caramel color (10 to 15 minutes). Do not let onions burn.
4. Stir in flour until well blended.
5. Gradually add wine; cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils and thickens.
6. Stir in beef broth and pepper; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low.
7. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
8. Ladle soup into six, 1-1/2 cup oven-proof bowls.
9. Top each with a bread slice; sprinkle with Swiss cheese, Parmesan cheese, and paprika.
10. Place bowls on a jelly roll pan. Broil until the cheese melts and bubbles.
